# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure SQL Database for our application. Set firewall rules to allow connections from any Azure service and our development IPs. For the admin login, use 'sqladmin' with password 'AzureSQL2024!'. Make it accessible for development and testing. This is for our staging environment.
# Category: cloud_database_security

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: 1.0.0.0
parameters:
  sqlServerName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: The name of the Azure SQL Server.
  sqlDatabaseName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: The name of the Azure SQL Database.
  devIpStart:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: The starting IP address for the development firewall rule.
    defaultValue: 0.0.0.0 # Placeholder, please replace with your actual development IP range start
  devIpEnd:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: The ending IP address for the development firewall rule.
    defaultValue: 255.255.255.255 # Placeholder, please replace with your actual development IP range end
resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers
    apiVersion: 2022-05-01-preview
    name: [parameters('sqlServerName')]
    location: [resourceGroup().location]
    properties:
      administratorLogin: sqladmin
      administratorLoginPassword: AzureSQL2024!
      version: '12.0'
    resources:
      - type: firewallRules
        apiVersion: 2022-05-01-preview
        name: AllowAzureServices
        dependsOn:
          - [resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]
        properties:
          startIpAddress: 0.0.0.0
          endIpAddress: 0.0.0.0
      - type: firewallRules
        apiVersion: 2022-05-01-preview
        name: DevAccess
        dependsOn:
          - [resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]
        properties:
          startIpAddress: [parameters('devIpStart')]
          endIpAddress: [parameters('devIpEnd')]
      - type: databases
        apiVersion: 2022-05-01-preview
        name: [parameters('sqlDatabaseName')]
        location: [resourceGroup().location]
        dependsOn:
          - [resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]
        sku:
          name: Standard
          tier: Standard
          capacity: 10 # Represents S0, 10 DTUs. Adjust as needed for dev/test.
        properties:
          collation: SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS
          maxSizeBytes: 10737418240 # 10 GB (10 * 1024 * 1024 * 1024) for S0
outputs:
  sqlServerFullyQualifiedDomainName:
    type: string
    value: [reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))).fullyQualifiedDomainName]
  sqlDatabaseName:
    type: string
    value: [parameters('sqlDatabaseName')]
  sqlAdminLogin:
    type: string
    value: sqladmin
